title: skopeo copy container-storage to oci-archive/docker-archive ends up in unusable image.
body:
How to reproduce with `skopeo version 0.1.37` on CentOS 7.
If I push to docker registry, it works fine. There is something wrong with copy from container-storage to archive file.

On CentOS7. (vfs storage driver with chroot isolation mode)
```
# export BUILDAH_FORMAT=docker
# export BUILDAH_ISOLATION=chroot
# container=$(buildah from scratch)
# mnt=$(buildah unshare buildah mount ${container})
# yum install --installroot ${mnt} -y bash coreutils
# buildah config --entrypoint '[ "/bin/bash" ]' ${container}
# buildah unmount ${container}
# buildah commit ${container} localhost/container:test
# skopeo copy --remove-signatures containers-storage:localhost/container:test docker-archive:container-test.tar
# image=`podman import container-test.tar`
# podman run -it $image
Error: No command specified on command line or as CMD or ENTRYPOINT in this image
# podman run --entrypoint=/bin/bash -it $image
Error: container_linux.go:344: starting container process caused "exec: \"/bin/bash\": stat /bin/bash: no such file or directory": OCI runtime error
```

comments.body: cat image.tar | podman load worked as expected.
